mean_en: a substance, found within all living things, that forms the structure of muscles, organs, etc. There are many different proteins and they are an essential part of what humans and animals eat to help them grow and stay healthy.
sentence: You can get protein from eggs, beans, and meat.
sentence_trans: 你可以从鸡蛋、豆类以及肉类中获取蛋白质。
word_etyma: prote第一的，原本的 + in化学中的构词成分 → 化学物质中基础的成分 → protein蛋白质
